title: ICAR IARI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ICAR IARI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR IARI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation of five years for SC/ST/Women and three years for OBC as on 29.05.2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc./graduation in biological science/agriculture/biology related subjects
qualification.details: B.Sc./graduation passed in biological science/agriculture/biology related subjects. Experience of working in sample preparation, general lab cleaning & maintenance and field work.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post at ICAR IARI is scheduled for 29 May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. or graduation degree in biological science, agriculture, or biology-related subjects to be eligible for the Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20000 plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Women and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant post announced by ICAR IARI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant post involves an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in sample preparation, general lab cleaning & maintenance, and field work is required for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) in New Delhi, Delhi, Pincode 110012.
